---
title: "prompt_linter.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\prompt_linter.py"
loc: 48
complexity: 16
logic_score: 5.85
style_score: 3.80
intel_score: 6.40
overall_score: 3.22
---

## Intent
The `prompt_linter.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on PromptLinter, parse_prompty_vars, audit_python_invocation, calculate_integrity_score. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via PromptLinter, parse_prompty_vars, audit_python_invocation, calculate_integrity_score. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [ast](file://ast)
- [os](file://os)
- [re](file://re)

### Exports
- `PromptLinter`
- `parse_prompty_vars`
- `audit_python_invocation`
- `calculate_integrity_score`
